channel.title: Victor Villas' Feed
channel.description: Combined feed of my online posts. Machine translated — please forgive any translation errors.

item.title: Comment
item.description: For the last 3 years of investing in North-American focused total market index funds I’ve noticed a consistent pattern of “bad news, therefore your portfolio went up”. Invasion of Ukraine, high inflation, genocide in Gaza, trade war, high unemployment… it all boils down to more forcing functions for keeping low interest rates, which fund techno-optimism, while techno-feudalism sprawls and tech oligarchs shape the world. (1/2)

item.title: Comment
item.description: More US imperialism was on my bingo card for 2026 but not kidnapping a president before I had my first groceries of the year. My disgust for this bully nation grows louder. It pains me that I moved inwards on their sphere of influence.
